name: Apollo Healthcare Corp.
summary: Apollo Healthcare Corp. is a private equity firm specializing in buyouts. It prefer to invest in founder-led businesses, carve-outs of non-core assets, industry consolidation, and growth-oriented businesses. The firm prefers to invest in private label consumer staples and aviation finance and asset management companies. It prefer to have majority stake in companies. Acasta Enterprises Inc. was founded in 2015 and is based in Toronto, Canada.
